title: ambrosia divaricata
intro: Ambrosia divaricata, also known as burr grass or divaricate burr grass, is a type of flowering plant in the sunflower family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Ambrosia divaricata include its ability to treat various ailments, such as fever, coughs, and skin irritations, as well as its potential to act as a natural antihistamine and digestive aid. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
